pr.title: Record: Legal Score-First TTT + Parallel Muon — val_bpb 1.1219 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines legal score-first TTT chunking with Parameter Banking and Parallel Muon optimizer for fast adaptation on a PR #414–derived stack.
techniques: score-first TTT with inference_mode chunk scoring
Parameter Banking enables batched Newton-Schulz orthogonalization
Parallel Muon skips DDP for bank params during async reduce-scatter
